name: BankNifty Weekly Short Strangle
hypothesis: BankNifty options tend to overprice implied volatility. Selling far OTM calls and puts captures time decay (Theta) provided the index stays within a defined range.

entry_rules.position_sizing: Sell 1 lot of 15-delta Call and 15-delta Put per 2 lakh capital.

exit_rules.stop_loss: Combined premium reaches 150% of initial collected premium.
exit_rules.target: Hold until expiry or exit at 10% remaining premium.
exit_rules.time_exit: Exit at 3:15 PM on expiry day.

risk_params.max_loss_per_trade: Undefined theoretically, managed to 2% of capital via stop loss.

market_conditions.volatility_regime: High IV dropping to Normal IV

notes: Monitor GEX levels to avoid gamma squeezes on 0DTE.
